film.title: Katilon Ke Kaatil
film.overview: A weather widow spends her life searching for her two missing sons to bestoy her fortune on.  When she finally finds two young men, are they who they seem?

dialogues.dialogue: Michael, Black Cobra here. Black Cora, I have the chariot and i'm coming to you, yes, ok. Wonderful, Michael. i'm proud of you. i'm proud. Michael, what happened? Oh my God! No! - Doctor sir.

There's no place for weak ways over here. These are the ways of a lover. it'll tear your heart. it'll bring the face of a proud person on its feet. Tell him that that might be someone else. Then what are you?

She is sitting with the lamps of life in the wind. The lamps of life. Then too, why are men so proud about their power? Then too, why are men so proud about their power? its women, who have defeated death.

Michawl, Michawl, are you all right? I am all right, I am all right. I am proud of you my boys. You have broken Black Cobras right hand. Now the path is clear. Come this side. Come on.
